items.title: Feature Selection (engineering pipeline)
items.description: The feature-engineering topic covers where selection sits in preprocessing, leakage risks, and production pipelines; this topic owns filter/wrapper/embedded methods in the dimensionality-reduction context.

items.title: Mutual Information
items.description: Mutual information provides a principled filter score for non-linear feature–target dependence used in SelectKBest and exploratory ranking.

items.title: Ridge and Lasso
items.description: L1 (Lasso) embedded selection zeros coefficients via sparsity-inducing penalties; Ridge shrinks without selecting; Elastic Net blends both.

items.title: Generalization
items.description: The goal of selection is better held-out performance and simpler models—not minimum training error; validation discipline determines whether a subset generalizes.

items.title: Principal Component Analysis
items.description: PCA reduces dimension by orthogonal projection into new components; feature selection keeps original columns for interpretability instead of linear combinations.
